name: Herb Roasted Potatoes Poupon
recipeIngredient: 6 medium new potatoes, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the mustard, olive oil, minced garlic, and Italian seasoning.
2. Place the potato chunks in a lightly greased baking pan or on a shallow baking sheet.
3. Toss the potatoes with the mustard mixture until evenly coated.
4. Bake at 425°F for 34 to 40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are fork tender.
